ranked_matches.title: New Zealand vs South Africa 2nd T20I (Match Ended)
Sheffield Shield: Victoria vs South Australia (Draw)

summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 2nd T20I concluded with New Zealand winning by 68 runs to level the series 1-1. The Sheffield Shield match between Victoria and South Australia ended in a draw. The Pakistan National T20 Cup match between KRW and SIAL is scheduled for 5:00 PM local time.
